title: Vietnamese-Style Curry Chicken
description: A flavorful and spicy curry dish made with chicken and a blend of Vietnamese and Indian spices.
instructions: Heat the mustardy oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the zesty lime juice and cook for another minute.
Add the curry, salt, and tomatoes, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
